reviews.comment: Professor Thesing is an amazing professor, and if you take any of her classes, I would recommend paying attention to achieve a good grade.

A wonderful professor who strives to make all of her students successful. If you put in the work and show up, the class is impossible to fail. I thought I would never be able to do some of the mathematical things I can do. Thanks to her class, it comes easier now. She can be a little tough, but it's for your own good. Get ready for some homework!
